title: ASC and AWERB Hub workshop report: October 2024
body: "The Animal Welfare Ethical Review Body (AWERB) subgroup of the Animals in Science Committee (ASC) held its 11th workshop for the AWERB Hub on 16 October 2024.  The aim of the event was to enable attendees to share and discuss:   an update on the work of the ASC  skills and training needed by an AWERB  the benefits of an active AWERB hub   This report sets out the key points and findings from the workshop.   We are aware this publication may have accessibility issues. We are reviewing it so that we can fix these. Read more about our accessible documents policy.   "
